steps.title: Expand and collect C terms
steps.content:
Expand $PC = N(18 - C)$ to get $$PC = 18N - NC$$
Add $NC$ to both sides to collect all $C$ terms: $$PC + NC = 18N$$

steps.title: Factor and solve for C
steps.content:
Factor $C$ from the left side: $$C(P + N) = 18N$$
Divide both sides by $(P + N)$: $$C = \frac{18N}{P + N}$$
Since $P + N = N + P$, this matches choice C — C is correct.
